roles.name: Sage of the Six Paths
roles.description: Master of all chakra natures — architects the over-arching jutsu solution and watches over its integrity.

roles.name: Jōnin Squad Captain
roles.description: Leads the genin squad through every mission, holds the timeline, and reports to the Hokage.

roles.name: Keeper of the Forbidden Scroll
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields, and permission sets sealed within the village archive.

roles.name: Master Sealmaster
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features through complex sealing techniques.

roles.name: Hokage of the Leaf
roles.description: Leader of all village shinobi craft — sets standards and guides the senior jōnin.

roles.name: Veteran ANBU Operative
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced shinobi craft.

roles.name: Chūnin Operative
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the missions under the ANBU's eye.

roles.name: Master of the Rasengan Bridge
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the gates.

roles.name: Summoning Contract Signer
roles.description: Lays the seals of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Sealer
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the shinobi patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Medic-Nin
roles.description: Tends the wounded mission and finds the maladies in the build before they reach the Kage.

roles.name: Herald of the Hidden Village
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Tactician of the Strategy Scroll
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert across the nations.

roles.name: Banner-Bearer of the Village
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily mission.

roles.name: Mission Scribe of the Hokage
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the shinobi craft of design.

roles.name: Elite Sannin Engineer
roles.description: Legendary developer-class shinobi — handles the deepest, most senior platform work.

roles.name: Genin Recruit
roles.description: Fresh from the academy — picks up configuration and discovery work under senior guidance.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

workstreams.name: Testing at the Great Naruto Bridge

konohagakure.name: Light the Hokage Faces
konohagakure.description: Discovery sign-off — the faces of the Hokage are unveiled at sunrise.

konohagakure.name: Forging the Rasengan
konohagakure.description: Build kickoff: the swirling sphere of chakra is shaped for the road ahead.

konohagakure.name: Audience at Hokage Tower
konohagakure.description: Mid-project gate: leadership review with the council of elders.

konohagakure.name: Shadow Clone Diversion
konohagakure.description: Phase invoice trigger: feint with a thousand clones to draw the eye.

konohagakure.name: Inauguration of the Hokage
konohagakure.description: Go-Live: the new Hokage is inaugurated upon the rooftop.

konohagakure.name: Sensei's Hand-off
konohagakure.description: Hyper-care close: village stewardship passed to the next generation.

sunagakure.name: Muster at Sunagakure
sunagakure.description: Project kickoff: the puppet corps marches from the Kazekage's office.

sunagakure.name: March to the Dunes
sunagakure.description: Build phase: shinobi deployed across the desert sands.

sunagakure.name: Sand Shield Holds
sunagakure.description: UAT gate: the sand shield holds against all attacks.

sunagakure.name: Charge of the Puppet Corps
sunagakure.description: Go-Live: the puppet brigade routs the invading force.

sunagakure.name: Return to the Kazekage
sunagakure.description: Hyper-care close: the squad returns home to the Sand.

sunagakure.name: Funeral of the Fourth
sunagakure.description: Final invoice: the burial of the fallen Kazekage.

kirigakure.name: The Mist Awakens
kirigakure.description: Discovery: the Hidden Mist surveillance plane online.

kirigakure.name: Forge the Seven Swords
kirigakure.description: Build: the legendary blades of the Mist deployed.

kirigakure.name: Mizukage's Audit
kirigakure.description: Solution review with the Fifth Mizukage herself.

kirigakure.name: Bridge Activation
kirigakure.description: Go-Live: the Great Naruto Bridge fully operational.

kirigakure.name: Mist Lifts
kirigakure.description: Project close: the bloody mist clears at last.

kirigakure.name: Final Reckoning
kirigakure.description: Final invoice from the Hidden Mist Village.

kumogakure.name: Council of the Raikage
kumogakure.description: Kickoff council high atop the cloud-wrapped mountain.

kumogakure.name: Tame the Tailed Beast
kumogakure.description: Discovery: reports modelled from the visions of the jinchūriki.

kumogakure.name: Weave the Lightning Reports
kumogakure.description: Build: dashboards crackling with chakra lightning.

kumogakure.name: Gift-Giving at Cloud Summit
kumogakure.description: UAT acceptance: gifts of the Raikage to each squad member.

kumogakure.name: Ride into the Storm
kumogakure.description: Go-Live + handoff: the Cloud shinobi depart on a new mission.

kumogakure.name: Final Recompense
kumogakure.description: Final invoice from the Lightning Daimyō.

Sakura Haruno.notes: Medical ninjutsu conference at the hospital.

Kakashi Hatake.notes: New Icha Icha volume release — must read in seclusion.

Shikamaru Nara.notes: Cloud-watching retreat — too troublesome to skip.

A (Raikage).notes: Strength training summit — bench-press the mountain.
